failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure feed reservoir is pressurized to maintain inlet pressure above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of solids or impurities in the reaction mixture
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular filtration and monitoring of feed solutions

failure_modes.cause: Failure of BPR leading to excessive pressure buildup
failure_modes.mitigation: Install pressure relief valves and conduct regular maintenance checks on BPR

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Conduct a pressure test of the system at maximum expected flow rates and temperatures for 1 hour.
Run a series of filtration tests on feed solutions to assess blockage potential.
Monitor pump performance under varying temperatures to evaluate cavitation risk.
